motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```class Solution:
    def subtractProductAndSum(self, n: int) -> int:
        product = 1
        total = 0
        for digit in str(n):
            product *= int(digit)
            total += int(digit)
        return product - total
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(n))
space complexity: O(log(n))
energy implications: LOW
